headline: Fox Corporation President and Chief Operating Officer John Nallen to Participate in Upcoming Deutsche Bank's 34th Annual Media, Internet & Telecom Conference
summary: Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) today announced that President and Chief Operating Officer John Nallen will participate in Deutsche Bank's 34th Annual Media, Internet & Telecom Conference on Monday, March 9, at approximately 8:55am (Eastern), 5:55am (Pacific).
